description: Built and maintained the global e-commerce platform at abrites.com, serving 4 independent legal entities with per-client dynamic pricing and 15 integrated payment providers — 8 implemented from scratch to meet specific regional requirements.

Designed and implemented data validation and normalization logic across heterogeneous external sources, including resolution of entity relationships without direct contextual links between divergent ERP schemas.

Maintained internal ERP/CRM (Python/Django + PostgreSQL), custom Symfony-based CMS, event management system, REST API (Django REST Framework + Swagger), CI/CD (GitLab CI), and Dolibarr ERP integration.

Worked on large and complex e-commerce projects using Magento (Adobe Commerce). Delivered customizations on core functionality, developed custom B2B modules and processes, and redesigned the checkout and invoicing pipeline.

Developed and maintained a wide range of projects varying in scale and complexity — from small landing pages for local businesses to complex systems for banks and insurance companies. Built custom e-commerce solutions from scratch.
Worked on a variety of small to mid-scale websites and APIs.

groups.label: Approach
items: Strong focus on problem analysis and solution design; experienced in breaking down complex business requirements into precise technical solutions, and in leveraging AI tooling to architect and implement features independently and efficiently.

projects.name: breezy-bg.com
projects.description: Shopware 6.5 e-commerce platform with custom modules replacing the core cart and checkout concept. Developed independently using AI-assisted tooling (Codex / Claude). Optimized for Bulgarian e-commerce law compliance.

projects.name: abrites.com
projects.description: Global automotive diagnostics e-commerce platform — see Abrites LTD in Work Experience for full detail.

projects.name: bigmarket.bg
projects.description: B2B wholesale platform for stationery and office supplies built on Magento 2, serving distributors with real-time inventory from 10+ warehouses.

projects.name: officemarket.bg / joya.bg
projects.description: Retail e-commerce for office and stationery products (sister site to BigMarket) built on Magento 2 with a heavily customized B2B/B2C business model.

projects.name: hermesbooks.bg
projects.description: Online bookstore for Hermes — Bulgaria's largest bookstore chain with 12 nationwide locations — built on Magento 2 with books, stationery, and cultural events.

projects.name: nippon.bg
projects.description: E-commerce site for the Nippon brand (solar collectors, air conditioners, intercom systems) — a Bulgarian brand owned and distributed by Bittel Ltd across Europe.

projects.description: Corporate presentation site built as a showcase for a custom Symfony 2 in-house framework.

projects.name: coloreffect.bg
projects.description: Interior design company specializing in luxury solar shading systems for windows and facades.

projects.description: B2B/B2C hotel booking and management platform with 1,200+ hotels and ~50 GB/day of real-time data processed from SOAP services.

projects.name: reynaers-rock-tramplin.zrockradio.bg
projects.description: Event voting site for ZRock Radio's rock competition — jQuery-based SPA/catalog hybrid.

projects.description: Website for NDK (National Palace of Culture) — the largest multifunctional congress and exhibition center in Southeast Europe, located in Sofia.

projects.description: E-commerce and product catalog for Bittel Ltd — official Bulgarian distributor of Daikin, Toshiba, Panasonic, Alcatel and others in air conditioning, solar tech, telecoms, and IT.

projects.description: Corporate site for INDEAVR — a Bulgarian technology services company specializing in digital transformation, data science, cloud, and AI solutions.
